title: Raccoon Removal in Howard Beach, Queens | $900–$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Howard Beach, Queens. Licensed experts remove raccoons from attics, crawl spaces & yards. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Howard Beach residents know that raccoons are a common problem in this waterfront Queens neighborhood, especially near Charles Memorial Park and the residential areas along the bay. These intelligent animals find their way into attics, garages, and trash areas, causing significant damage and health risks. Best Pest Control NYC offers professional raccoon removal services starting at $900, with comprehensive solutions to keep your Howard Beach property raccoon-free.
whyUs: Our licensed technicians have over 15 years of experience serving Howard Beach and understand the unique challenges posed by the neighborhood's proximity to Jamaica Bay and the abundance of mature trees. We provide humane, effective raccoon removal with same-day emergency service and complete exclusion work to prevent future infestations.
localContext: Howard Beach's mix of single-family homes, many with large yards near the water, and older properties around Cross Bay Boulevard create ideal conditions for raccoon activity. The area's proximity to Spring Creek Park and Shell Bank Marsh provides natural habitats that bring raccoons into close contact with residential areas, making professional removal services essential for homeowners.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Howard Beach?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Howard Beach typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points, and damage repair needed. A basic single raccoon removal starts around $900, while extensive infestations requiring multiple traps, exclusion work, attic cleanup, and repairs can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Howard Beach?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common in Howard Beach due to the neighborhood's proximity to Jamaica Bay, Charles Memorial Park, and nearby marshlands. The abundance of trees, accessible trash, and older homes with potential entry points make Howard Beach an attractive area for raccoons seeking shelter and food, especially during breeding season in spring and when seeking winter dens.

faqs.question: What are signs of raccoons in my Howard Beach home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include loud thumping or scratching noises in the attic at night, torn shingles or fascia boards, disturbed trash cans, raccoon droppings near entry points, visible paw prints, damaged insulation, and strong odors from urine or feces. You may also see raccoons on your roof at dusk or hear chattering vocalizations, especially if there are babies present in spring.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Howard Beach property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service for Howard Beach residents when raccoons pose immediate threats. Initial trap placement typically occurs within 24 hours of your call. Complete removal time varies from 3–10 days depending on the number of raccoons and whether babies are present. After removal, we perform exclusion work and repairs to prevent re-entry, ensuring your home remains raccoon-free long-term.
